journal_entry.description: Purchase of raw materials for R&D of new snack product
journal_entry.rationale: Raw materials purchased for research and development are capitalized as inventory (asset increase) and the R&D activity itself is expensed. Since these materials are specifically for R&D purposes, we record both the inventory acquisition and the R&D expense. HST at 13% is recoverable on this purchase in Ontario. Cash decreases by the total amount paid including HST.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Raw materials for R&D: split between inventory asset (materials that may be used/tested) and R&D expense (consumption in development activities). Under IFRS, research costs are expensed as incurred. HST 13% recoverable in Ontario. Total payment $50,000 + $6,500 HST = $56,500 by cheque.
